mapper.select: SELECT id, question_id, tag_name, sort_order FROM question_tag ORDER BY question_id ASC, sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT qt.tag_name, COUNT(DISTINCT qt.question_id) AS question_count FROM question_tag qt INNER JOIN question q ON q.id = qt.question_id WHERE q.status = 1 GROUP BY qt.tag_name ORDER BY question_count DESC, qt.tag_name ASC
